T1_cat_trees_large_cats.confidence: HIGH — WEAKEST SERP among all targets. Niche ecommerce brands rank, not high-DA editorial. Content depth + stability angle is unique differentiator.
T1_cat_trees_large_cats.risk_factors: BuzzFeed DA advantage. CatTreeKing 20yr brand history.

T2_self_cleaning_litter_box.confidence: MEDIUM — High-DA editorial dominance (CNN, Wirecutter, Cats.com). Content expansion alone won't displace. Need backlink velocity + testing methodology claims.
T2_self_cleaning_litter_box.risk_factors: Litter-Robot brand dominance. Cats.com '31 models tested' authority. DA gap.

T4_how_tall_cat_tree.confidence: HIGH — Informational query with moderate competition. Breed-specific height table + visual guide will differentiate. Vet authority claims needed.
T4_how_tall_cat_tree.risk_factors: Hepper.com and catster.com have vet-reviewed badges.

T5_maine_coon_cat_tree.confidence: HIGH — Breed-specific niche query. Adding comparison matrix + weight testing data will be decisive. Few dedicated ecommerce brands compete here.
T5_maine_coon_cat_tree.risk_factors: Cats.com editorial authority. mainecooncentral.com breed-specific niche.
